checks.description: After reset release, the clk_div output should exhibit at least one toggle within a conservative observation window, indicating progress of the odd division function.
checks.pass_condition: Within the defined window, clk_div changes value at least once and does not remain constant or X/Z throughout.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is deasserted and the design is observed for the specified number of clock cycles.

checks.description: The clk_div output must never assume X or Z values during normal operation after reset.
checks.pass_condition: All sampled values of clk_div are either 0 or 1 throughout the observation period.
checks.trigger_condition: Continuously while the design is not in reset.

checks.description: During active low reset (rst_n asserted), clk_div must remain stable and not toggle.
checks.pass_condition: clk_div does not change value while rst_n is low.
